title: KUM TAWN KHA TAWN HONG KEM TOPA

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kumtawn khatawn Nong kep manin Topa, Kong muang uh hi.
A beisa hun launa, dahna khempeuh, Nang
Zingsang khuavak, Ni thak hong suak sial in,
Topa hehpihna bek kong ngak uh

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A beisa hun teng zong Na khut sung om, hong om-pih in.
sung tun na’ng, Lam hong hilh in.
Khuamialna ah khuavak hong tang-sak in,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mailam hun ding zong a thei khol Topa, kong zui uh
Muanhuai mah le ung zong hong om pih in, Hong beel-beel nung.
Ko hun bei ciang inn nuamah hong kha in.
